0fce7d90.title: LLM Engineer
0fce7d90.description: Description : We are looking for LLM Engineers to design and build the reasoning, tool-use, and chaining logic that powers our AI framework. This role focuses on how large language models think, plan, decide, and actincluding prompt strategies, reasoning chains, tool invocation, and structured outputs.Key Responsibilities : - Design and implement reasoning chains (planexecutereflect, ReAct, self-consistency, decomposition strategies)- Build structured chain-of-thought abstractions without exposing internal reasoning unnecessarily- Optimize reasoning flows for accuracy, latency, and cost- Translate architectural patterns into concrete agent behaviors- Implement memory usage patterns (short-term, long-term, contextual retrieval)- Support multi-agent interactions through well-defined interfaces and protocolsRequired Skills : - Hands-on experience with LLMs and agent frameworks such as GPT, Claude, Mistral, or similar- Strong programming skills in Python (or equivalent)- Strong understanding of reasoning patterns (ReAct, CoT, Tree-of-Thoughts, plannerexecutor)- Experience implementing tool-augmented LLM workflows- Experience with APIs, async workflows, and distributed systems concepts- Ability to write clean, testable, and maintainable code- Experience with LangChain, Semantic Kernel, AutoGen, CrewAI, or similar- Experience with RAG, vector databases, or hybrid retrieval approaches- Strong Python programming with experience in Hugging Face transformers, LangChain,OpenAI SDK (ref: hirist.tech)

08ad92f0.title: Platform Engineer
08ad92f0.description: Build backend APIs, FastAPI services, resume analysis pipelines, and candidate research flows.

b1bf23b7.title: ai engineer
b1bf23b7.description: We are seeking a skilled AI Engineer with strong experience in AI, Generative AI, Agentic frameworks, and LangChain. The candidate should have hands-on expertise in building intelligent applications, LLM-based solutions, prompt engineering, and autonomous agents. Experience in integrating APIs, deploying scalable AI systems, and working with modern AI tools and frameworks is required.

0fce7d90.name: Pragnyan Ramtha
0fce7d90.rationale: Pragnyan Ramtha is a strong candidate for the LLM Engineer role, with hands-on experience in LLM fine-tuning, AI system design, and robust agentic frameworks. The candidate's experience in optimizing AI models and engineering high-availability serverless MLOps backends aligns well with the job requirements. Additionally, their achievements in AI optimization techniques and open-source contributions demonstrate their expertise and commitment to the field.
evidence: Fine-tuned Phi-4 (14B) on Chain of Thought and Tool integrated Reasoning datasets to optimize multi-step problem solving and tool-use efficiency.

Engineered a high-availability serverless MLOps backend on GCP (Cloud Functions, Cloud Run) for production grade AI orchestration, achieving 99.9% uptime while successfully cutting down on cloud costs by 70%.
Boosted accuracy of customer support bot by developing a RAG pipeline utilizing semantic search for real-time documentation retrieval and source attribution.

0fce7d90.name: Rishabh Jain
0fce7d90.rationale: Rishabh Jain is a strong candidate with 3+ years of experience in NLP, LLMs, and machine learning, having designed and deployed GenAl solutions that automate workflows and improve accuracy. His expertise in prompt engineering, model evaluation, and accuracy optimization is well-aligned with the job requirements. He also has hands-on experience with LLMs, RAG pipelines, and vector databases.
evidence: Built and deployed multiple RAG-based chatbots for internal knowledge retrieval.
Expertise in prompt engineering, model evaluation, and accuracy optimization.
Fine-tuning open-source LLMs (LLaMA, Mistral, Falcon) on custom datasets.

0fce7d90.name: Muhammad Ghulam Jillani
0fce7d90.rationale: Muhammad Ghulam Jillani is a highly skilled LLM Engineer with expertise in Generative AI, LLMs, and Autonomous AI Systems, making him a strong fit for the role. His experience in designing and deploying scalable AI/ML pipelines and leading cross-functional teams aligns with the job requirements. He also has a proven track record of delivering high-impact AI solutions.
evidence: Led AI-Driven MVPs & Enterprise Deployments: Spearheaded high-impact MVP projects, including an Enterprise-Grade RAG Pipeline for BI, a Health Guard AI Pipeline for Remote Patient Monitoring, a GPT-4o-Based Conversational AI Chatbot, and an Agentic AI System for Legal & Financial Advisory, leveraging Generative AI, RAG, and Autonomous AI Agents.

Advanced Multi-Agentic AI Architectures: Engineered multi-agent systems with LangChain, LangGraph, PhiData, Pinecone, and Graph DBs to enhance automation, decision-making, and autonomous AI-driven workflows across domains.
Core Skills: Machine Learning, Deep Learning, Generative AI, LLMs (GPT, Gemini, LLaMA, Falcon,DeepSeek), Natural Language Processing (NLP), Time Series Analysis, Model Deployment, Prompt Engineering.
